g.text: Owns vision; issues shot intents; sets pacing;
approves takes. Mirrors a human craft role.
Madaan'23 · Shinn'23 · Yao'22 · Zheng'23 · Bai'22 · Du'23
sha256(artifact) → C2PA manifest → signed by GateKeeperAgent

Emitted only if L1 ∧ L2 ∧ L3
SAG-AFTRA AI rider · EU AI Act Art. 50
